target_hypothesis.summary: There is a tension between features exhibiting near-constant values (low cardinality) such as bulk and flag features, and other features showing strong class-conditioned structural variation and distributional shifts, suggesting heterogeneous feature behavior within the dataset.
open_gaps: How should models reconcile or leverage the coexistence of near-constant and highly variable features?
Could the low cardinality features represent saturation or measurement limits that obscure meaningful variation?

compressed_regions.summary: Multiple backward bulk-related features exhibit extremely low cardinality with unique values equal to 1 and very low cardinality ratios, indicating near-constant values across the partition.

locality.scope_value: Bwd Avg Bulk Rate|Bwd Avg Bytes/Bulk|Bwd Avg Packets/Bulk|Bwd PSH Flags|Bwd URG Flags
notes: cluster of backward bulk and flag features with minimal variability

compressed_regions.summary: Forward bulk-related features similarly show extremely low cardinality with unique values equal to 1 and very low cardinality ratios, mirroring backward bulk features' behavior.

locality.scope_value: Fwd Avg Bulk Rate|Fwd Avg Bytes/Bulk|Fwd Avg Packets/Bulk|Fwd URG Flags
notes: cluster of forward bulk and flag features with minimal variability

compressed_regions.summary: Backward packet length features show substantial class-conditioned structural variation with high variance ratios and differing unique value counts between BENIGN and DDoS classes.

locality.scope_value: Bwd Packet Length Max|Bwd Packet Length Mean|Bwd Packet Length Std|Avg Bwd Segment Size
notes: group of backward packet length and segment size features with class-conditioned variation

compressed_regions.summary: Average Packet Size shows class-conditioned structural variation with moderate variance ratio and differing unique value counts between BENIGN and DDoS classes.

Destination Port feature shows strong distributional differences between BENIGN and DDoS classes, with DDoS class having a dominant ratio of 1.0 and zero entropy, indicating concentration on a single port.

notes: single feature with class-conditioned distributional divergence

preserved_weak_signals.descriptor: Fwd PSH Flags and SYN Flag Count form a perfect correlation pair but individually have low cardinality with unique values=1 and cardinality ratio=1e-05

notes: dependency pair with low cardinality features

unresolved_tensions.description: Tension between features with near-constant values (low cardinality) and other features showing strong class-conditioned structural variation and distributional shifts.

merged_findings: Average Packet Size and backward packet length features exhibit a tension between low cardinality near-constant behavior and strong class-conditioned structural variation, with some features showing high variance ratios and class separation signals.
Backward bulk-related features with near-constant values show high local label conflicts, suggesting saturation or measurement limits rather than meaningful class variation.
Clusters of features (e8 to e12, e33) demonstrate strong class-conditioned distributional shifts, while others (e23 to e32) form stable, low-cardinality groups lacking finite pairwise dependencies.

Dependency contextualization confirms concentrated dependency patterns for high-variation features like 'Bwd Packet Length Max' but fails for low-cardinality features due to their near-constant nature.
The tension between low-cardinality stable features and high-variation features is preserved and characterized locally without cross-cluster relation verification.
preserved_contradictions: No local contradictions detected; tension between low cardinality and class variation remains unresolved but preserved.
Tension between low-cardinality near-constant features and features with strong class-conditioned variation remains unresolved but preserved.
open_gaps: Distribution verification for Average Packet Size and other features was not performed due to budget and scope constraints, limiting full quantification of distribution shifts.
Relation verification between heterogeneous feature clusters was not performed due to bounded local context constraints.
Dependency contextualization for low-cardinality features was not possible due to absence of finite pairwise dependencies.
Analysis limited to backward bulk features in some tasks; forward bulk and other features remain unverified locally.
aggregation_handoff.update_focus: Maintain focus on the preserved tension between low-cardinality near-constant features and features exhibiting strong class-conditioned structural variation, emphasizing local characterization and dependency contextualization within bounded contexts while acknowledging unresolved distributional and relational gaps.
